languages.text: "Запрос... отклонен... с благодарностью". {n}Паскаль хрипит, но вздевает руку в жесте отрицания.{/n} "Данный... инцидент... классифицируется как акт техномученичества. Постулаты Омниссии отвергают возможность вмешательства извне. Очищение должен произвести я сам". {n}Вокс техножреца издает захлебывающийся звук.{/n}

"Request... denied... with gratitude." {n}Pasqal rasps, yet he raises a hand in a gesture of refusal.{/n} "This... incident... is classified as an act of tech-martyrdom. The Omnissiah's tenets forbid any outside interference. I alone must execute the cleansing." {n}The Tech-Priest's vox emits a choking sound.{/n}

Постулаты Омниссии отвергают возможность вмешательства извне. Очищение должен произвести я сам". {n}Вокс техножреца издает захлебывающийся звук.{/n}

The Omnissiah's tenets forbid any outside interference. I alone must execute the cleansing." {n}The Tech-Priest's vox emits a choking sound.{/n}

languages.text: «Solicitud... denegada... con gratitud». {n}Pasqal jadea, pero alza una mano en señal de rechazo.{/n} «Este... incidente... se clasifica como un acto de tecnomartirio. Los principios del Omnissiah prohíben la interferencia externa. Debo ejecutar la purificación en solitario». {n}El voco del tecnosacerdote emite un ruido ahogado.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Request... denied... with gratitude." {n}Pasqal rasps, yet he raises a hand in a gesture of refusal.{/n} "This... incident... is classified as an act of tech-martyrdom. The Omnissiah's tenets forbid any outside interference. I alone must execute the cleansing." {n}The Tech-Priest's vox emits a choking sound.{/n}

Los principios del Omnissiah prohíben la interferencia externa. Debo ejecutar la purificación en solitario». {n}El voco del tecnosacerdote emite un ruido ahogado.{/n}

languages.text: “请求……驳回……但我心怀感激。”{n}帕斯卡沙哑地说道，同时抬手示意拒绝。{/n}“此……事件……被归类为技术殉道行为。欧姆尼赛亚的教义禁止任何外来干涉。净化仪式必须由我独自完成。”{n}这位技术神甫的音阵里传出近乎于窒息的杂音。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Request... denied... with gratitude." {n}Pasqal rasps, yet he raises a hand in a gesture of refusal.{/n} "This... incident... is classified as an act of tech-martyrdom. The Omnissiah's tenets forbid any outside interference. I alone must execute the cleansing." {n}The Tech-Priest's vox emits a choking sound.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “请求……驳回……但我心怀感激。”{n}帕斯卡沙哑地说道，同时抬手示意拒绝。{/n}“此……事件……被归类为技术殉道行为。欧姆尼赛亚的教义禁止任何外来干涉。净化仪式必须由我独自完成。”{n}这位技术神甫的音阵里传出近乎于窒息的杂音。{/n}

languages.text: "Anfrage ... dankend ... abgelehnt." {n}Pasqal hebt die Hand zu einer ablehnenden Geste.{/n} "Dieser ... Vorfall ... ist als Tech-Märtyertum klassifiziert. Die Gebote des Omnissiah verbieten eine Einmischung von außen. Ich muss die Reinigung selbst vornehmen." {n}Aus dem Vox des Techpriesters ertönt ein ersticktes Geräusch.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Request... denied... with gratitude." {n}Pasqal rasps, yet he raises a hand in a gesture of refusal.{/n} "This... incident... is classified as an act of tech-martyrdom. The Omnissiah's tenets forbid any outside interference. I alone must execute the cleansing." {n}The Tech-Priest's vox emits a choking sound.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Anfrage ... dankend ... abgelehnt." {n}Pasqal hebt die Hand zu einer ablehnenden Geste.{/n} "Dieser ... Vorfall ... ist als Tech-Märtyertum klassifiziert. Die Gebote des Omnissiah verbieten eine Einmischung von außen. Ich muss die Reinigung selbst vornehmen." {n}Aus dem Vox des Techpriesters ertönt ein ersticktes Geräusch.{/n}

languages.text: « Demande... rejetée... avec reconnaissance. » {n}Pasqal a du mal à articuler, mais il parvient néanmoins à lever une main pour exprimer son refus.{/n} « Cet... incident... est classifié comme un acte de technomartyre. Les préceptes de l'Omnimessie interdisent toute intervention extérieure. Je dois procéder seul à la purification. » {n}La voix étranglée du technoprêtre est entrecoupée de bruits d'étouffement.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Request... denied... with gratitude." {n}Pasqal rasps, yet he raises a hand in a gesture of refusal.{/n} "This... incident... is classified as an act of tech-martyrdom. The Omnissiah's tenets forbid any outside interference. I alone must execute the cleansing." {n}The Tech-Priest's vox emits a choking sound.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Demande... rejetée... avec reconnaissance. » {n}Pasqal a du mal à articuler, mais il parvient néanmoins à lever une main pour exprimer son refus.{/n} « Cet... incident... est classifié comme un acte de technomartyre. Les préceptes de l'Omnimessie interdisent toute intervention extérieure. Je dois procéder seul à la purification. » {n}La voix étranglée du technoprêtre est entrecoupée de bruits d'étouffement.{/n}

languages.text: "Talep... Minnetle... Reddedildi." {n}Hırıldayan Pasqal, reddetme hareketi olarak elini kaldırıyor.{/n} "Bu... Vaka... Bir tekno şehitlik eylemi olarak sınıflandırıldı. Hermesih'in ilkeleri, dışarıdan müdahale etmeyi yasaklar. Arındırmayı tek başıma ben gerçekleştirmeliyim." {n}Tekno Rahip'in voksundan boğuluyormuş gibi bir ses çıkıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Request... denied... with gratitude." {n}Pasqal rasps, yet he raises a hand in a gesture of refusal.{/n} "This... incident... is classified as an act of tech-martyrdom. The Omnissiah's tenets forbid any outside interference. I alone must execute the cleansing." {n}The Tech-Priest's vox emits a choking sound.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Talep... Minnetle... Reddedildi." {n}Hırıldayan Pasqal, reddetme hareketi olarak elini kaldırıyor.{/n} "Bu... Vaka... Bir tekno şehitlik eylemi olarak sınıflandırıldı. Hermesih'in ilkeleri, dışarıdan müdahale etmeyi yasaklar. Arındırmayı tek başıma ben gerçekleştirmeliyim." {n}Tekno Rahip'in voksundan boğuluyormuş gibi bir ses çıkıyor.{/n}

languages.text: 「要求...拒否...感謝の意を込めて。」{n}パスカルはかすれた声で言った。しかし、彼は拒絶の意思を示すように手を挙げた。{/n}「この...事件...はテクノロジーの殉教者として分類される。オムニシアの教義は外部の干渉を禁じている。私は一人、浄化を実行する。」{n}テクプリストのヴォックスは、息苦しさを感じさせる音を発した。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Request... denied... with gratitude." {n}Pasqal rasps, yet he raises a hand in a gesture of refusal.{/n} "This... incident... is classified as an act of tech-martyrdom. The Omnissiah's tenets forbid any outside interference. I alone must execute the cleansing." {n}The Tech-Priest's vox emits a choking sound.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「要求...拒否...感謝の意を込めて。」{n}パスカルはかすれた声で言った。しかし、彼は拒絶の意思を示すように手を挙げた。{/n}「この...事件...はテクノロジーの殉教者として分類される。オムニシアの教義は外部の干渉を禁じている。私は一人、浄化を実行する。」{n}テクプリストのヴォックスは、息苦しさを感じさせる音を発した。{/n}
